nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 9am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 62. Southwest wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain before midnight, then rain likely and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 41, with temperatures rising to around 47 overnight. West wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and patchy fog before 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 47. North wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 26. Northeast wind 6 to 9 mph.
